Our Collections

Jewelry for Every Bold Statement

From delicate everyday pieces to commanding statement jewelry — each creation is selected and crafted for those who wear their identity without apology.

Custom Rings

Made to Order Bestseller

Statement rings crafted in solid gold, platinum, and sterling silver. Engagement rings, wedding bands, cocktail rings — designed around your vision.

Starting at $250

Necklaces & Pendants

Fine Jewelry In Stock

Diamond solitaires, gold chains, gemstone pendants — layers of luxury in 10K, 14K, and 18K gold. Perfect for gifting or treating yourself.

Starting at $180

Bracelets & Earrings

Gemstone & Gold New Arrivals

Sapphire, emerald, and diamond-set bracelets and earring collections. From tennis bracelets to chandelier drops — elegance you can feel.

Starting at $150
Inside the Boutique

Where Miami Wears Its Gold

Step inside our Downtown Miami showroom at 146 NE 1st Ave — a curated space where luxury meets personal touch, seven days a week.

Why 305 Miami Jewelry

Miami's Most Trusted Jeweler

A perfect 5.0 on Google. 21 five-star reviews. Walk in — leave wearing something extraordinary.

Perfect 5.0 Rating

21 verified five-star reviews on Google. Not a single unhappy customer — because we don't leave until you're in love with what you're wearing.

Custom Craftsmanship

Every custom piece is hand-finished to your exact specifications. Bring us your idea — a sketch, a photo, a dream — and we'll bring it to life in gold and stone.

Downtown Miami Location

Conveniently located at 146 NE 1st Ave in the heart of Downtown Miami. Walk-ins welcome, Mon–Sat 10am–6pm. Easy parking nearby.
